    "Wrong overload class setting on the motor control/VFD parameters"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Halt commissioning of the motor",
    "Recalculate the correct overload protection class based on motor nameplate and application requirements",

  "rationale": "An incorrect overload class setting (e.g., Class 20 instead of Class 10, or vice versa) can lead to either nuisance tripping or, more critically, motor burnout and fire hazards due to delayed thermal protection response. This parameter must be corrected and verified before the motor is run under load.",
